name: East Side Baptist Family Living Center
description: East Side Baptist Family Living Center is a place to play pickleball in Mountain Home, AR. There are 2 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are private.

name: First United Methodist Church
description: First United Methodist Church is a place to play pickleball in Mountain Home, AR. There is 1 indoor court. The lines are permanent, but you'll need to bring your own net. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water. The court is private.

description: Come play pickleball at L C Sammons Youth Center in Mountain Home, AR! There are 3 indoor hard courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.

name: Legacy Racquet and Fitness
description: Legacy Racquet and Fitness is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Mountain Home, AR. There are 7 hard courts. 4 are indoors and 3 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, trainers or lessons, water, restrooms, and locker rooms. A membership is required to play.
hours: Monday - Friday 8am - 6pm Saturday: 9am - 1pm Sunday Office Closed Contact Legacy Racquet and Fitness 514 Coley Drive Mountain Home, Arkansas 72653 (870) 425-4342 customerservice@legacyracquetandfitness.com Copyright ©2025 Legacy Racquet and Fitness

name: North Arkansas Youth Center
description: North Arkansas Youth Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Cotter, AR. There is 1 indoor hard and wood court. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. Players have access to restrooms and water. A one-time fee is required to play.
